briefs.title: BC Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect April 2026, clarifying which services require registration
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act General Manager has created a new regulation — the Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation — that takes effect April 13, 2026. It defines key terms and clarifies which activities count as 'gaming services' (services that require a licence or registration under BC gaming law), including rules about lottery tickets, casino chips, and automated banking machines at gaming venues.
briefs.action_required: Review the new regulation before April 13, 2026 to confirm whether your gaming-related services require registration.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Services and Gaming Work Regulation takes effect
